notes:
CONSOLIDATION LOGIC:
- Started from 54 raw records. Excluded 15 with is_theme_chrome=true (home gradient+overlay, all testimonial avatars on home/sound/lessons, shared breath lines, faq/topnav/burger/sound/EN glyphs, faq-mini & faq-list chevrons, footer social SVGs, en hero breath lines, breath divider, ea-logo header, favicon, theme-sweep ea-logo classification).
- Deduped overlapping records: (1) home hero video appeared twice (home cluster + theme-wide video sweep) → MED-HOME-01; (2) books-hero.jpg appeared twice (legacy-hub CSS + global CSS sweep) → MED-SHOP-13. The 'theme sweep / assets-images classification' record (#56) was chrome (ea-logo) and excluded; its note that the other 10 image files are content is already reflected across the content clusters.
- Result: 38 consolidated content records across 11 pages.

PAGE GROUPING NOTE: The task requires the 11-page order home, treatment, sound-healing, lessons, about, mokesh, shop, blog, contact, faq, en. The raw data had NO standalone /treatment records — auditors covered sound-healing and lessons but not treatment. Since /treatment is a documented service route using the identical block-hero + forced-portrait pattern (ea_wave2_render_service_blocks, inc/wave2-w2-04.php) as its two siblings, I created two INFERRED slots (MED-TREAT-01 hero bg, MED-TREAT-02 bio portrait) so the page is not missing from the intake UI. These are marked 'needs-new' and clearly flagged as inferred in their notes — verify against the live /treatment route before shipping. If you prefer strictly only audited records, drop MED-TREAT-01/02 (total would be 36 across 10 pages).

SHOP CONSOLIDATION: I merged the raw 'shop-blog' cluster's shop/products/books surfaces under a single 'shop' page bucket per the requested page list (shop covers /shop catalog, the 5 product sub-pages /didgeridoos /bags /stands-storage /stand-floor /repair, the /books archive+bundle, the 3 /books/<slug> detail heroes, the per-book studio gallery, and the legacy books-hero bg). Each retains its true page_path so the intake UI can route correctly. This is the largest bucket (13 records).

BLOG: All 3 blog slots are CMS-owned (WP featured images / post body). Marked 'placeholder' because the theme renders a gradient fallback when no image is set — actual presence depends on per-post data in the WP DB, not the theme.

KEY ASSET-QUALITY FLAG: eyal-portrait-hero.jpg is reused as the portrait on home (MED-HOME-03), about (MED-ABOUT-01), and all three service bio blocks. Multiple auditors report this file is actually a scanned press clipping, not a clean studio portrait. Home/about records show 'has-asset' (file present) but the service records correctly mark it 'needs-new'. Recommend a single new clean studio portrait of Eyal to replace this file site-wide.

TOTALS BREAKDOWN: 38 total content media = 18 has-asset + 11 placeholder + 9 needs-new. (Note: the totals object schema only has fields total_media/with_asset/placeholders/galleries/videos/excluded_chrome; I added needs_new for completeness — 9 needs-new records: MED-HOME-02, MED-TREAT-01, MED-TREAT-02, MED-SOUND-01, MED-SOUND-02, MED-LESSON-01, MED-LESSON-02, MED-MOKESH-03, MED-CONTACT-01.) Galleries=11 (is_gallery true): MED-MOKESH-02(19), MED-MOKESH-04(4), MED-SHOP-01(5), MED-SHOP-02..06(6 each), MED-SHOP-07(3), MED-SHOP-08(3), MED-SHOP-12(4), MED-EN-01(3). Videos=5 (hero-video/video-embed): MED-HOME-01, MED-HOME-02, MED-MOKESH-01, MED-MOKESH-03, MED-MOKESH-04.
